full_text:
Yuan Feng (Zhouyang) 袁逢 (周陽)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Feng (袁逢), styledZhouyang (周陽), was born in Ruyang commandery, Runan commandery. Father of Yuan Shu and possibly Yuan Shao. Minister of Agriculture in service to Han. Yuan Feng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
